app.title: AI-Driven FMEA
app.subtitle: This system uses **Natural Language Processing (NLP)**, **Google Gemini AI**, and **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)** to identify and analyze risks in project management documents, with historical memory and semantic search.

sidebar.title: Settings
sidebar.theme_help: Toggle between light and dark theme
sidebar.temperature_help: Low = More conservative | High = More creative
sidebar.temperature_legend:
**Temperature Legend:**
• **0.0 - 0.3**: Conservative and objective analysis (recommended for risks)
• **0.4 - 0.6**: Balance between precision and creativity
• **0.7 - 1.0**: More creative and exploratory (unexpected insights)
sidebar.guide_title: Guide: How to Interpret the Analysis
sidebar.guide_probability:
### **Probability** (chance of occurring)
- **High**: >60% chance of happening
- **Medium**: 30-60% chance
- **Low**: <30% chance
sidebar.guide_impact:
### **Impact** (effect on project if it occurs)
- **High**: Delay >2 weeks OR >20% of budget
- **Medium**: Delay 1-2 weeks OR 10-20% budget
- **Low**: Minimal and manageable impact
sidebar.guide_strategies:
### **Risk Response Strategies**
- **Mitigate**: Reduce probability/impact with preventive actions
- **Accept**: Monitor the risk (when tolerable and low)
- **Transfer**: Pass to third parties (insurance, subcontracting)
- **Avoid**: Change plan to completely eliminate the risk
sidebar.guide_rag:
### **Historical Context (RAG)**
When enabled, the system searches previous similar analyses to suggest actions based on past experiences. This feature requires a history of previous analyses to be effective.

upload.title: Document Upload
upload.upload_label: Upload Meeting Minutes, Emails, Reports or Project Documents
upload.doc_types:
**Recommended Document Types:**
- Meeting Minutes
- Project Emails
- Status Reports
- Change Requests
- Scope Documents

upload.rag_help: Use historical context from previous analyses AND save this analysis to history
upload.clean_analysis_help: Disables the use of lessons learned. Useful for unique/innovative projects.

upload.no_similar_cases: No similar cases found in history (75% similarity threshold)
upload.loading_rag: Loading RAG and searching for similar cases...
upload.error_extract: Could not extract text from files.
upload.view_results_tip: ✅ Go to the 'Analysis' tab to view detailed results and visualizations.
upload.no_risks: No significant risks were identified in the documents.
upload.configure_api: Configure your API Key in the sidebar to get started.
upload.upload_files: Upload at least one document to start the analysis.

results.showing_all: Showing all risks identified in ALL files
results.overlap_warning: Attention: {count} theme(s) appear in multiple documents!

quantitative.title: Quantitative Risk Analysis
quantitative.subtitle: Add financial data to calculate EMV (Expected Monetary Value) and Monte Carlo simulations
quantitative.input_desc: For each risk, estimate the financial impact (min / most likely / max):

quantitative.reserve_recommendation: Reserve {amount} in the budget to cover identified risks with {confidence}% confidence.
quantitative.no_financial_data: No financial data available. Click 'Add Financial Analysis' to enter cost estimates.

history.title: Analysis History (RAG)
history.info_available: The system has {count} analysis(es) stored that can be used as lessons learned.
history.info_empty: Empty history. Perform some analyses to start accumulating lessons learned.
history.feedback_legend:
📊 **Feedback Legend:**  
✅ Excellent (Score ≥ 4.0) | ⚠️ Average (Score ≥ 2.0) | ❌ Poor (Score < 2.0) | ⭕ No feedback yet
history.search_placeholder: Enter a text or risk description to search for similar cases:
history.clear_warning: Attention: This action removes all saved analyses and cannot be undone.
history.no_data_to_clear: No data to clear. History is empty.
history.model_tooltip: AI model that converts text into numerical vectors
history.dimensions_tooltip: Size of the vector for each text (larger = more detailed)
history.rag_unavailable: RAG system is not available. Check dependencies.

about.title: About the Project
about.research_subtitle: An Exploratory Approach to Predictive Risk Analysis in Project Management using Machine Learning
about.practical_desc: System developed for corporate use in project management, allowing:
about.feature_1: **Automated Risk Analysis** in unstructured documents (minutes, emails, reports)
about.feature_2: **Identification of Weak Signals** that may impact projects in the future
about.feature_3: **Decision Support** with insights based on AI and NLP
about.feature_4: **Multilingual**: Works in Portuguese, English, French and other languages supported by Gemini
about.layer_1:
**Layer 1 - Ingestion:**
- Multiple format upload (PDF, TXT, DOCX)
- Automatic text extraction
about.layer_2:
**Layer 2 - Processing:**
- Google Gemini 1.5 Pro (LLM)
- Advanced Prompt Engineering
about.layer_3:
**Layer 3 - Visualization:**
- Streamlit Interface
- Interactive Dashboard
- Results Export
about.phase_2:
#### **Phase 2 - RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)**
- Vector Store with ChromaDB
- Embeddings with Sentence Transformers
- Semantic search in historical database
about.phase_3:
#### **Phase 3 - Hybrid Model**
- Structured feature extraction via LLM
- Predictive model with scikit-learn
- Time series analysis
about.phase_4:
#### **Phase 4 - Production**
- User authentication
- Persistent database
- REST API for integration
- Containerization (Docker)
about.footer_note: System in constant evolution with planned improvements for RAG, hybrid models and enterprise integrations.
